title: Citonyx Measurement Run Record
description: One observation of whether this site was cited by a single AI answer engine for a single prompt on a single run. Multiple records (N>=3 per prompt/platform) are collected per date file. See ../README.md for the recording protocol.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the run was performed.

prompt.description: The exact prompt text submitted to the platform (copy of the prompts.yaml value at run time).

platform.description: Which AI answer engine was queried.

query_method.description: How the answer was obtained. 'api' = official API (gemini grounding, perplexity sonar); 'reverse' = anonymous reverse-engineered endpoint (chatgpt backend-anon via s5treak/reverse-chatgpt, search force-triggered); 'manual' = observed by hand in the UI. The same platform can give different results via different methods, so this must be recorded explicitly.

model.description: Specific model/version behind the platform at run time (e.g. 'sonar', 'gpt-4o-2026-xx', 'gemini-2.0-flash'). Null/unknown when the platform hides it. Needed to separate model-update effects from content effects.

cited.description: Whether this site appeared in the answer in ANY form (link, brand mention, or quote). Use citation_type for the kind.

citation_type.description: How the site was cited: 'link' = clickable source URL (strongest); 'quote' = our text quoted; 'mention' = brand named without link; 'none'/null = not cited. Always 'none'/null when cited=false.

position.description: Rank of this site among the cited sources (1 = first). Null when not cited or when the platform exposes no ordering.

competitors.description: Other cited domains observed in the same answer, as bare lowercase domains (e.g. 'ahrefs.com'), no scheme/path.

source_url.description: The exact URL of this site that was cited, or null if not cited.

response_excerpt.description: Short verbatim excerpt of the answer around the citation/mention. AI answers are not replayable, so this preserves evidence — especially for manual runs where saving the page may breach ToS.

run_index.description: 1-based index of this repeat run for the same prompt+platform+date (N>=3 to account for non-determinism).
